events.agenda: 5:00 PM Registration & Welcome; 5:30 PM Intro by PMI; 5:45 PM "For Builders, by Builders" - Stephan Durry; 6:15 PM Running dbt in a Highly Regulated Enterprise; 6:45 PM Breather; 7:00 PM From Fabric to Fantastic; 7:30 PM dbt Quiz; 7:45 PM Networking.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

events.event_description: STRV is excited to bring the Czech-based dbt community together for the second time! Our morning meetup will shine a spotlight on data product success stories.
events.raw_text: Thu, Oct 5, 2023 · 8:30 AM to 12:00 PM CEST. Lightning Talk #1: How to Deliver Data Products Fast With dbt - Arthur Mills. Lightning Talk #2: Cheater detection: tackling a moving target with data - Veronika Peskova. Lightning Talk #3: 27 clinics, 12 systems, 1 solution: integration using dbt - Matej Novak.

talks.description: How to build end-to-end data products fast, based on experience with dbt at an enterprise company under time pressure.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #1: How to Deliver Data Products Fast With dbt
Description: Ever been roped into a project at the last minute and asked to build an end-to-end solution by yesterday?
talks.title: How to Deliver Data Products Fast With dbt

talks.description: Detecting cheating patterns in gaming using data and collaboration between product teams and developers.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #2: Cheater detection: tackling a moving target with data
Description: The gaming industry is in constant battle with cheaters.
talks.title: Cheater detection: tackling a moving target with data

talks.description: Using dbt to integrate 27 clinics across 8 countries with multiple diverse source systems into a single solution.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #3: 27 clinics, 12 systems, 1 solution: integration using dbt
Description: Data Integration: Join me for a lightning talk on how we used dbt to integrate 27 clinics in 8 countries
talks.title: 27 clinics, 12 systems, 1 solution: integration using dbt

events.agenda: 6:00-6:30pm Check in; 6:30-6:35pm Welcome; 6:40-7:00pm Presentation #1; 7:00-7:20pm Presentation #2; 7:20-7:40pm Presentation #3; 7:40-8:00pm Presentation #4; 8:00-8:05pm Closing Remarks; 8:05-10:00pm Networking.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! STRV is excited to be bringing the Czech-based dbt community together for the first time.
events.raw_text: Thu, Sep 15, 2022 · 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM CEST. Presentation #1: Essay on Data Product by Jozef Reginac. Presentation #2: Running Python Scripts Directly From Your dbt Projects by Jan Maly. Presentation #3: Data Modeling as the First Data Hire by Simon Podhajsky. Presentation #4: Boosting DX With Automated Data Sandbox Macro by Honza Rasa.

talks.description: Reframing the idea of a 'data product' using a Product Management framework, with a twist.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #1: Essay on Data Product by Jozef Reginac

Description: Many think data teams create reports, dashboards and pivot charts. But we think our purpose is to help make better decisions.
talks.title: Essay on Data Product

talks.description: How to run Python scripts directly from dbt projects using fal, for use cases SQL and dbt alone can't solve.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #2: Running Python Scripts Directly From Your dbt Projects by Jan Maly

Description: There are many use cases that you can't solve with SQL & dbt, but the Python ecosystem is perfect for that.
talks.title: Running Python Scripts Directly From Your dbt Projects

talks.description: Lessons learned coming into a company as the first data hire and building out data modeling from scratch.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #3: Data Modeling as the First Data Hire by Simon Podhajsky

Description: Coming into a company as the first data hire can be overwhelming
talks.title: Data Modeling as the First Data Hire

talks.description: Using dbt macros to build an isolated Snowflake environment with all model dependencies, boosting developer experience for CI pipelines and manual dev work.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
🗣️Presentation #4: Boosting DX With Automated Data Sandbox Macro by Honza Rasa

Description: All about the power of dbt's macros and built-in access to models graph.
talks.title: Boosting DX With Automated Data Sandbox Macro
